tweets.text:
Eg. It's cold outside
When you say 'It's so cold', you're just emphasising how cold it is - maybe you even enjoy the chilly weather.

But when you say 'It's too cold', it means the cold is excessive and unpleasant, like it's unbearable and you want to stay inside as it's too cold

That's cold email being done wrong.
